headline: Does MGM’s New Cross‑Property Sales Structure Change The Bull Case For MGM Resorts International (MGM)?
summary: MGM Resorts International recently overhauled its sales structure, introducing new leadership roles and a reorganized team to enhance customer experience and streamline planning for events, meetings, and group business across its portfolio. This reconfiguration places greater emphasis on coordinated, cross-property sales efforts, which could be especially relevant as the company leans into high-value conventions, luxury programming, and large-scale gatherings. We’ll now examine how this...
